topics.title: Radio Host Controversy and Richard Simmons Tapes
topics.summary: The studio discusses the suspension of a radio personality following a controversial apology to Al Sharpton before transitioning into a series of comedic prank calls featuring the voice of Richard Simmons.

topics.title: Richard Simmons Advocates for School Physical Education
topics.summary: The studio hosts Richard Simmons as he discusses his legislative efforts to reinstate physical education and recess in schools to combat childhood obesity.

topics.title: Richard Simmons and Obesity Advocacy
topics.summary: The show features Richard Simmons discussing his campaign for school physical education, his personal history with weight, and a heated exchange regarding public figures and racial remarks.

topics.title: Richard Simmons Exit and Musical Performances
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Richard Simmons' emotional departure from the show, followed by segments on local radio success and upcoming musical performances.

topics.title: Film Reviews and Upcoming Show Announcements
topics.summary: The studio discusses a listener's critique of a film review, the upcoming lineup for Howard TV, and the legacy of comedian Sam Kinison.

topics.title: Controversy Over Racial Remarks and Al Sharpton
topics.summary: The studio discusses a host's controversial remarks regarding racial slurs, the lack of an apology to Al Sharpton, and a history of Sharpton's public actions.

topics.title: Confrontation Over Racial Remarks
topics.summary: The studio hosts a heated exchange between Don Imus and Al Sharpton regarding offensive remarks made toward women of color and the resulting public backlash.

topics.title: Artie Lange's Recovery and Weight Management
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie Lange's ongoing recovery from addiction, the use of medication to manage cravings, and his physical health and weight.

topics.title: Guitar Performance by John Denner
topics.summary: The studio features a performance and interview with guitarist John Denner, who performs Eddie Van Halen's "Eruption" despite having only one hand.

topics.title: One-Handed Guitarist Performance
topics.summary: The studio features a performance by John Denner, a guitarist with a physical disability who uses a custom device to play complex solos like "Eruption."

topics.title: American Idol Voting and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio discusses the impact of listener voting on American Idol, a guest's experience with Richard Simmons, and various news segments including local reports and celebrity updates.

topics.title: Sanjaya Malakar Popularity and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a guest's claims regarding sickle cell anemia, the career of Howard Stern, and the internet popularity of American Idol contestant Sanjaya Malakar compared to Harry Potter.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including a caller's specific fetish, legal actions involving Howard Stern, celebrity rumors regarding Paris Hilton and Angelina Jolie, and the performance of Barack Obama on late-night television.

topics.title: J.D.'s Upcoming Reunion and Hawaii Jokes
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where the host discusses J.D.'s upcoming reunion with his mother, jokes about Hawaiian culture, and reacts to recent media appearances by a controversial figure.

topics.title: Don Imus Controversy and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses the backlash against Don Imus for his racially offensive remarks, updates on American Idol contestant Sanjaya, and various news segments including Iraq war reports and upcoming concert announcements.
